pattern: Sort the weights and greedily pair the lightest remaining person with the heaviest from opposite ends; the heaviest always boards, and the lightest joins only when their combined weight fits the limit.
hints: Each boat holds at most two people, so the question is how to pair them to use the fewest boats.
After sorting, consider the heaviest person who still needs a boat; the best companion they could possibly have is the lightest person left.
Sweep with a pointer at each end: always seat the heavier, and advance the lighter pointer too only if the pair's weight is within the limit; count one boat per step.

edge_inputs.description: no pair fits so everyone rides alone
all at the limit, none can pair

stress.description: random weights with a limit at least the max weight, varied length
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = rng.randint(1, max(1, size))
    people = [rng.randint(1, 30000) for _ in range(n)]
    limit = rng.randint(max(people), 30000)
    return [people, limit]
stress.note: limit kept at or above the heaviest person so every input is feasible
